title: asphodelus albus subsp. delphinensis
intro: Asphodelus albus subsp. delphinensis is a subspecies of the white asphodel, a type of flowering plant that belongs to the asphodel family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Asphodelus albus subsp. delphinensis include its ability to aid in the treatment of various digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and take advantage of its health benefits.
